name: G. K. Goh Holdings Limited
summary: G. K. Goh Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides corporate services in Singapore, Australia, Malaysia, Hong Kong, and China. The company offers share registry, corporate secretarial work, accounting, tax and payroll, governance, risk and compliance, and employee share plan management services; and management consultancy services. It also provides residential aged care and healthcare related services; and operates nursing homes. The company was founded in 1979 and is based in Singapore. G. K. Goh Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of GKG Investment Holdings Pte Ltd.
